code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    ()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut cur = 0
    mut has = false
    mut neg = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when None
        ()
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          if has
            if neg
              nums = nums + [-cur]
            else
              nums = nums + [cur]
            end
            cur = 0
            has = false
            neg = false
          end
        else if b == 45
          neg = true
        else if b == 43
          neg = false
        else
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has
      if neg
        nums = nums + [-cur]
      else
        nums = nums + [cur]
      end
    end
    let len = nums.len()
    mut sum = 0
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < len
      match nums.get(j)
      when None
        ()
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
        if j == 0
          out = "#{sum}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sum}"
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
